layman_headline: Extreme Fear grips the market — no swing trade setups meet our quality bar right now.
layman_explanation: The crypto market is deeply fearful with a Fear & Greed score of 25 ('Extreme Fear'). Bitcoin is holding relatively well at $66,400 and dominance is high at 56.9%, meaning money is flowing out of altcoins and into Bitcoin. Every altcoin on our watchlist has significant problems: some have already run up too much, others are in freefall with no clear bottom, and the rest have poor risk/reward setups. Patience is the best trade here.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The market is fearful but hasn't shown clear reversal signals on any quality altcoin. Watch for BTC to either break higher (which could eventually rotate into alts) or for oversold altcoins to form proper bottoms with volume confirmation.
expert_reasoning: Systematically evaluating all 9 candidates: (1) DEXE has severely conflicting data — 24h change shows -70% crash but chart analysis shows uptrend at $36.27 vs listed price $10.10 — untradeable with unreliable data. (2) 币安人生 has the best chart setup (bull flag, +0.80 bias) but R/R ratio is only 0.97x — inadequate for swing trading in extreme fear conditions. (3) LDO shows Three White Soldiers with +0.85 chart bias, but has already run +51.7% in 5 days and R/R is a terrible 0.38x — classic case of chasing. (4) UB has Morning Star reversal and good R/R (3.44x) but is below all MAs and already up 34.6% in 7 days. (5) BONK has -2.0 chart bias with Three Black Crows and Bearish Marubozu — absolute avoid. (6) ETH is below all MAs with bearish structure. (7) MON is in a downtrend below all MAs. (8) NIGHT has zero chart data. (9) VVV is slightly bearish. With BTC dominance at 56.9% and Fear & Greed at 25, this is a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades. Our reliable RSI signal (83% win rate) isn't giving clean oversold reads on quality setups — BONK's RSI 31 is paired with a catastrophic chart.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.9% is actively suppressing altcoin performance — capital is rotating to BTC safety
Extreme Fear (25) with flat trend means sentiment hasn't bottomed yet — could worsen before improving
No candidate offers both a clean technical setup AND acceptable risk/reward ratio simultaneously
watch_list: BTC behavior at $67K-$68K resistance — a breakout could signal risk-on rotation into alts
Fear & Greed index — watch for a move below 20 (capitulation) or above 30 (recovery)
LDO if it pulls back to $0.30-$0.33 support with RSI dropping to 40-45 — would create much better R/R entry
market_context: Bitcoin is showing resilience near $66.5K with +2.7% weekly gains, but altcoins are broadly weak. BTC dominance at 56.9% and Extreme Fear at 25 create a hostile environment for altcoin swing trades — capital is seeking safety in BTC and stables.
context_banner: Extreme Fear with high BTC dominance means patience outperforms aggression — no altcoin setup currently justifies deployment of capital.

key_signals.description: Extreme Fear at 25/100 with flat weekly trend indicates persistent risk aversion without signs of capitulation bottom — historically reliable signal (67% win rate) suggests waiting for sub-20 or recovery above 30.
Our most reliable signal (83% win rate) shows no clean oversold opportunities — the only near-oversold reads (BONK 31, MON 38) are paired with strongly bearish chart structures, disqualifying them.
Best chart patterns (LDO Three White Soldiers, 币安人生 Bull Flag) both have terrible risk/reward ratios (0.38x and 0.97x respectively), meaning potential downside exceeds or matches potential upside.
Bitcoin nearing seven-week high despite geopolitical tensions suggests BTC strength, but this is channeling capital away from alts rather than lifting the broader market.
'ETH derivatives reset and the next retail trade' headline suggests ETH positioning is resetting — could create future opportunity but premature to act on without confirming price action.
